entry.title: Unpacking Google’s massive search documentation leak
entry.quote: This breakdown unveils potential Google Search ranking factors, including details on PageRank variations, site authority metrics and more.

entry.title: TikTok is reportedly splitting its source code to create a US-only algorithm
entry.quote: TikTok denied a Reuters report that engineers are cloning the recommendation algorithm to let it work full independently of its Chinese parent company, ByteDance.

entry.title: Training is not the same as chatting: ChatGPT and other LLMs don’t remember everything you say
entry.quote: Every time you start a new chat conversation, you clear the slate. Each conversation is an entirely new sequence, carried out entirely independently of previous conversations from both yourself and other users.

entry.title: Did you hear the story about how $400k worth of Playdates?
entry.quote: Well, guess what got hastily dumped at a random restaurant this morning?

entry.title: Find websites similar to yours
entry.quote: Discover websites using similar color palettes.
